name: Recorded Future
description: Integrate with Recorded Future to enrich indicators with risk scores, evidence, and threat context from the world's largest intelligence collection

actions.name: Lookup IP Address
actions.description: Enrich an IP address with Recorded Future risk score, risk rules, and threat context

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g. intelCard,risk,sightings,threatLists,analystNotes)

actions.name: Lookup Domain
actions.description: Enrich a domain with Recorded Future risk score, risk rules, and threat context

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

actions.name: Lookup File Hash
actions.description: Enrich a file hash with Recorded Future risk score, malware context, and threat associations

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: File hash (MD5, SHA-1, or SHA-256) to look up

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

actions.name: Lookup URL
actions.description: Enrich a URL with Recorded Future risk score and threat context

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

actions.name: Lookup Vulnerability
actions.description: Enrich a CVE with Recorded Future risk score, exploit status, and trending intelligence

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: CVE ID to look up (e.g. CVE-2021-44228)

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

actions.name: Search Alerts
actions.description: Search Recorded Future alerts triggered by configured alert rules

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Lookup Malware
actions.description: Retrieve intelligence on a malware family from Recorded Future

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Malware name or Recorded Future entity ID

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

actions.name: Search Indicators
actions.description: Search for indicators matching specified risk rules and thresholds in Recorded Future

parameters.name: list
parameters.description: Threat list ID to filter by
